title: Climate Change Today
sentences: Climate change is one of the biggest challenges facing our world today.
The Earth's average temperature is rising because humans burn coal, oil and gas.
These fuels release gases into the air that trap heat around our planet.
As a result, we see more extreme weather, such as heat waves, heavy storms and long droughts.
Scientists say we can still slow down climate change if we act quickly.
We can save energy, use more clean power like wind and solar, and protect forests that absorb carbon dioxide.
